description_long: This is a compact, tracked military tank with a cylindrical turret mounted centrally on its chassis. The tank features a long, slender cannon protruding from the front of the turret, and the turret is equipped with a protective rail around its top edge. The body is covered in angular armor plates, with visible hatches and a rear engine compartment. The tracks are wide and robust, with star-shaped wheels and a rugged tread suitable for traversing rough terrain. The exterior is painted in a mottled green and brown camouflage pattern, and a prominent red star insignia is visible on the turret's side. The tank's design suggests it is built for urban and battlefield maneuvering, with reinforced armor and functional weapon mounts.
description: A compact, tracked military tank with a cylindrical turret, long cannon, and green-brown camouflage, featuring a red star insignia and robust armor plating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, the cylindrical turret with rail, long cannon, and the detailed track system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cannon, sloped frontal armor, and the pointed extensions on the lower front hull.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red star insignia on the turret, the track system, and the rear engine compartment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the engine compartment, rear lights, and the back of the turret with its hatch.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped and angular panels, moderate thickness, and reinforced turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Mottled green and brown camouflage with subtle red spots, applied in an irregular, organic pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red star insignia on the side of the turret.
